demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a two-storey home; currently unable to get upstairs because of breathlessness, sleeping in a recliner in the lounge

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't catch my breath when I lie down, I have to sleep on three pillows, and my legs have swollen up like balloons over the last few days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The breathlessness got much worse over the last two days — last night I woke up suddenly gasping for air, and now I can't lie flat at all and my legs are really swollen.

symptom_narrative.onset: creeping breathlessness on exertion over about 3 weeks, then much worse in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: about 3 weeks, acutely worse for 2 days
symptom_narrative.character: breathless when I move around and especially when I lie down; last night I woke up suddenly gasping for air and had to sit up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's been — I can only speak in short sentences and I have to sit upright to breathe
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my chest/breathing, and both legs are swollen
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse lying down and at night; a bit easier sitting up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting upright, propping up on pillows
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat, walking around, any exertion
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: both legs swollen up over a few days, and I feel completely drained and weak
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't do my housework, can't get up the stairs, sleeping in a chair in the lounge

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: breast cancer, treated with chemotherapy which I finished about 12 months ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: chemotherapy including a drug I was told was called doxorubicin; no heart problems that I know of

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular heart or blood pressure tablets

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; managing on her own since finishing cancer treatment; no one else at home to help

objective_data_offered.value: both lower legs look swollen and puffy up past the ankles to the mid-calf; patient is sitting leaning upright and speaking in short sentences
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over video only; degree of pitting cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: my weight has gone up about 4 kilos in the last week
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single self-reported reading on a home bathroom scale

objective_data_offered.value: sleeping in a recliner chair in the lounge with several pillows stacked; unable to use the upstairs bedroom
